messages.content: 使用MatLab软件，基于模式识别人工神经网络框架，将样本中有机物根据反应去除率预先人工划分为易降解（去除率>80%）、不易降解（去除率≤80%）两类，输入计算所得的各有机物的分子参数，在网络中进行训练、交叉验证后，对各化合物可降解能力进行模式分类。  翻译

Using MatLab software and based on the pattern recognition artificial neural network framework, the samples of organic compounds are pre-artificially divided into two categories: easily degradable (removal rate > 80%) and not easily degradable (removal rate ≤ 80%) based on their reaction removal rate. The calculated molecular parameters of each organic compound are input into the network for training and cross-validation, and the degradability of each compound is classified in the pattern.

润色  Using MatLab software and based on the pattern recognition artificial neural network framework, the samples of organic compounds are pre-artificially divided into two categories: easily degradable (removal rate > 80%) and not easily degradable (removal rate ≤ 80%) based on their reaction removal rate. The calculated molecular parameters of each organic compound are input into the network for training and cross-validation, and the degradability of each compound is classified in the pattern.
使用MatLab软件，基于模式识别人工神经网络框架，对有机物的样本进行预先人工划分为易降解（去除率>80%）和不易降解（去除率≤80%）两类。然后将各有机物的分子参数输入到网络中进行训练和交叉验证，以分类各化合物的可降解能力。

英文润色  Using MatLab software and based on the pattern recognition artificial neural network framework, the samples of organic compounds are pre-artificially divided into two categories: easily degradable (removal rate > 80%) and not easily degradable (removal rate ≤ 80%) based on their reaction removal rate. The calculated molecular parameters of each organic compound are input into the network for training and cross-validation, and the degradability of each compound is classified in the pattern.

Using the MatLab software and the pattern recognition artificial neural network framework, the organic compound samples are pre-artificially divided into two categories based on their reaction removal rate: easily degradable (removal rate > 80%) and not easily degradable (removal rate ≤ 80%). The molecular parameters of each organic compound are then calculated and input into the network for training and cross-validation to classify the degradability of each compound in a pattern.
英语翻译   为考察模型中不同分子参数对有机物去除率的影响，使用有限差分法进行局部灵敏度分析（式4-1）来评价模型优劣。有限差分法可通过给设计变量一定的摄动，用中心差分公式来计算输出对考察变量的近似导数

To examine the impact of different molecular parameters on the removal rate of organic compounds in the model, finite difference method is employed for local sensitivity analysis (Equation 4-1) to evaluate the quality of the model. By perturbing the design variables and using the central difference formula to calculate the approximate derivative of the output with respect to the examined variables, the finite difference method can be used.

英文润色    To examine the impact of different molecular parameters on the removal rate of organic compounds in the model, finite difference method is employed for local sensitivity analysis (Equation 4-1) to evaluate the quality of the model. By perturbing the design variables and using the central difference formula to calculate the approximate derivative of the output with respect to the examined variables, the finite difference method can be used.

In order to investigate the influence of various molecular parameters on the removal rate of organic compounds in the model, a finite difference method is utilized to carry out a local sensitivity analysis (Equation 4-1) in order to evaluate the quality of the model. By introducing perturbations to the design variables and using the central difference formula to calculate the approximate derivative of the output with respect to the examined variables, the finite difference method can be applied.
第j个输入变量的摄动量
Perturbation amount of the jth input variable.
Perturbation amount of the jth input variable. 英文润色
The perturbation amount of the jth input variable.
英文翻译  变量xj摄动时对输出值y的影响
The impact of perturbing variable xj on the output value y.
Please provide me with more information or a specific sentence that needs to be translated.
Okay, feel free to ask if you have any translation needs in the future.
英文润色  The impact of perturbing variable xj on the output value y.
The effect of perturbing the variable xj on the output value y.
